title: Easy Name Tag Crafting
description: The mod allows you to easily create a name tag
body:
The mod allows you to easily create a name tag

![Name Tak Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/588765e03be87704f89b74767cffe490195dca52.png)

Avaible on:
- Forge: 1.20.1
- NeoForge: 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.8

### ATTENTION
You can definitely add this mod to your modpack.
